CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-24-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-05-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-02-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
Steven Brewer, Esq., for Plaintiff Callan Hovland, also present.
Damien Morozumi, Kara Pape and Dennis Simmons, Esq., for Defendants San Francisco Parking, Inc. Dba SFO Shuttle Bus Company (RAC).
02:00 p.m. - Parties present and reached a settlement, terms read into the record as follows:
Settlement in the amount of $700,000.00 to all claims, each to bears own costs and fees, funding in 21 days. To reduced in writting and to be signed by parties.
All agreed to terms, matter is placed on CRC 225 calendar on Mar. 2, 2004 at 10:00 am. in Dept. 212 for dismissal.
